cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Danish goes with none of Americano, Ristretto, or Caramel.
$12 goes with exactly one of Cortado, Danish, or Crimson.
Between Muffin and Crimson, one goes with Hazelnut and the other with Maple.
Crimson, Jade, and Onyx go with Ben, Caramel, and Hazelnut, in some order.
Exactly two of these are true: Cara goes with Caramel; Cortado goes with Croissant; Latte goes with Onyx.
$11 goes with at least two of Ben, Croissant, and Maple.
Bagel goes with at most one of Cara, Ristretto, Hazelnut, and $11.
Muffin goes with exactly four of Felix, Americano, Maple, Jade, and $13.

clues: Drift goes with none of Botanist, Technician, or Ceres.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Leech goes with none of Buzzbait, Wobbler, or Bluegill.
